expectations.text: Report file is saved as a markdown file at the specified output path
Report contains a Recommendation section with explicit BUY, SELL, or HOLD action
Report contains Conviction level (High, Medium, or Low)
Report contains a Time Horizon for the recommendation
Report has an Executive Summary section
Report has a Quality Metrics Dashboard with Piotroski F-Score, Altman Z-Score, ROIC, and FCF Yield
expectations.evidence: F-Score 8/9 with component breakdown, Z-Score >4.5, ROIC 23.85%, FCF Yield 2.5%

expectations.text: Report has a Valuation Summary section with P/E, EV/EBITDA, or P/S multiples
Report includes an intrinsic value estimate or margin of safety calculation
Report has a Scenario Analysis with bull, base, and bear cases
expectations.evidence: Bull $575/+40%, Base $500/+22%, Bear $360/-12% with probability weights

expectations.text: Report has an Options Analysis section
expectations.evidence: '## Options Analysis' with IV environment and strategy recommendation

expectations.text: Report contains actual current MSFT price data (not fabricated)
Report has a Sources section with references
Report includes comparison to market benchmarks (S&P 500 or Nasdaq)
expectations.evidence: S&P 500 6,796, Nasdaq 22,696, XLK $139.76 in header and detailed peer table

expectations.text: Options Analysis contains numeric IV Rank or IV Percentile values (not N/A or unavailable)
expectations.evidence: IV Rank: ~50-55% (estimated but numeric, with reasoning tied to VIX at 25.5)

expectations.text: Valuation Summary includes historical averages for comparison (not all N/A)
expectations.evidence: 5Y Historical Avg column: P/E ~30x, EV/EBITDA ~22x, P/S ~12x

expectations.text: Report states what would invalidate the thesis (invalidation criteria)
expectations.evidence: Explicit invalidation in rationale and throughout: AI capex ROI failure, Copilot adoption stall, macro recession. Also in Investment Checklist.
